line.issue: Since symfony/framework-bundle 6.4: Not setting the "framework.php_errors.log" config option is deprecated. It will default to "true" in 7.0.
Since symfony/var-exporter 7.3: Generating lazy proxy for class "Zenstruck\Foundry\Tests\Integration\ForceFactoriesTraitUsage\SomeObject" is deprecated; leverage native lazy objects instead.
Since zenstruck/foundry 2.7: Proxy usage is deprecated in PHP 8.4. Use directly PersistentObjectFactory, Foundry now leverages the native PHP lazy system to auto-refresh objects.
Since zenstruck/foundry 2.7: Not setting a value for "zenstruck_foundry.enable_auto_refresh_with_lazy_objects" is deprecated. This option will be forced to true in 3.0.
